programme.title: E7
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: Music Bank K-Chart
programme.desc: Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: E327
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E327
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E528
programme.desc: Foreigners who have left their familiar worlds behind and come to the unfamiliar land of Korea! A vivid, real-life adaptation story of foreigners trying to settle into Korean society for various reasons. This reality program warmly portrays their concerns about jobs, marriage, and parenting while living in Korea.

programme.title: E7

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: E327
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E31
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: E322
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: E3 - Animals Gone Wild
programme.desc: As the popular characters of songs and stories, farm animals are celebrated all over the world. But few stories tell of their sister species who live in the wild. These animals known primarily as livestock, beasts of burden, or even pets must fend for themselves beyond the fences of their domesticated kin.

programme.title: E4 - Infestation
programme.desc: Uninvited guests. Using sheer numbers to claim a territory, some animal groups are considered “pests.” But their very survival may depend on finding a home where they’re not welcome.

programme.title: E2 - Return of the Light
programme.desc: Experience the north Atlantic’s intense, brief summer with its animal residents. Follow Arctic fox cubs learning to hunt for survival, an otter pup going solo for the first time, a mate-seeking puffin, and tiny reindeer taking their first steps.

programme.title: E3 - Children of the Storm
programme.desc: In Iceland only one out of six cubs has survived. Abandoned by her parents, she now has to fend for herself. The reindeer herd swim two miles across open water. In Scotland, 35,000 grey seals arrive for their annual breeding season.

programme.title: E1 - Welcome to the Tundra
programme.desc: Wake up post-hibernation with 7 ravenous bears as Stage 1 of the competition kicks off. Battle wolves with new mom BoldFace, see tiny Stomper vie for power and Blondie’s love, and stand back as grizzled vet Bernie brawls with clueless teen Casanova.

programme.title: E2 - Return of the Light
programme.desc: Experience the north Atlantic’s intense, brief summer with its animal residents. Follow Arctic fox cubs learning to hunt for survival, an otter pup going solo for the first time, a mate-seeking puffin, and tiny reindeer taking their first steps.

programme.title: E3 - Children of the Storm
programme.desc: In Iceland only one out of six cubs has survived. Abandoned by her parents, she now has to fend for herself. The reindeer herd swim two miles across open water. In Scotland, 35,000 grey seals arrive for their annual breeding season.

programme.title: E1 - Welcome to the Tundra
programme.desc: Wake up post-hibernation with 7 ravenous bears as Stage 1 of the competition kicks off. Battle wolves with new mom BoldFace, see tiny Stomper vie for power and Blondie’s love, and stand back as grizzled vet Bernie brawls with clueless teen Casanova.

programme.title: The Great Elephant Tale
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of three elephants across three very distinct African habitats. Their travels combine to tell the story of how these emotional and intelligent creatures evolved over millions of years to survive on the continent.

programme.title: E4 - Operation Rhino
programme.desc: Across Africa 97% of black rhinos have been killed for their horns. In 1997 the species was declared officially extinct in Zambia. But now, thanks to an ambitious reintroduction plan, they’re back. Poaching hasn’t gone away – their horns are still prized in Asian medicine. But a small, dedicated team are fighting to keep them safe. This is the frontline of conservation – it doesn’t get any tougher.

programme.title: E6 - Migration
programme.desc: Epic flights, adventurous sea journeys and exhausting road trips all play a key part in the lives of many species. These empires travel in search of food, shelter or a mate. But booking and organizing travel is no easy feat when those plans involve hundreds – even thousands – of individuals.

programme.desc: Four misfits struggling with ordinary problems are pulled through a portal into the Overworld.

programme.desc: An extraction team embarks on a mission to extract prehistoric creatures' DNA that will bring life-saving benefits to humanity.

programme.desc: When Mung is forced to spend the day in Chef Certifrycation school, he butts heads with a fickle instructor.

programme.title: What A Girl Wants
programme.desc: Free-spirited teenager Amanda Bynes brings a breath of fresh air to the stuffy world of her long-lost father, Colin Firth.

programme.title: Smallfoot
programme.desc: The Bigfoot legend is turned upside down when a bright young Yeti finds something he thought didn’t exist—a human.

programme.title: E4 - The Devil And Li'l D
programme.desc: Li'l D dreams of signing a record deal come true.

programme.title: E9 - Westley Side Story
programme.desc: The Westley kids are challenged to a music competition.

programme.title: E16 - Free Philly
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Missing their friend and feeling guilty for their role in making him feel unwanted the Westley kids have their work cut out for him when they try to woo him back. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.

programme.title: E17 - Tamika And The Beast
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: E2 - Little Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: B.D. Wong and Vu Mai lend their voices to this animated episode of Little Red Riding Hood, retold in a Chinese setting.

programme.title: What A Girl Wants
programme.desc: Free-spirited teenager Amanda Bynes brings a breath of fresh air to the stuffy world of her long-lost father, Colin Firth.

programme.title: Smallfoot
programme.desc: The Bigfoot legend is turned upside down when a bright young Yeti finds something he thought didn’t exist—a human.

programme.desc: To make money to buy a new toy, Andy and Rodney set up a cart to sell sandwiches.

programme.desc: Tori discovers that her friends have been secretly going to a fancy restaurant instead of playing in an annual ping pong tournament.

programme.title: E110 - Donnie Goes Deep
programme.desc: Donnie and Wingnut go to restore power to the Lair but get trapped by the East River 3! The water is rising and they're not alone... there's a monster down there with them!

programme.title: E107 - The Truth is Out There
programme.desc: Acu thinks a fish-loving alien is in town, and Mica offers to help him track it down.

programme.title: E205 - A Midsummer Night's Scheme
programme.desc: Max agrees to mentor Captain Perfect's younger sister, who is headed down the path of becoming a supervillain. But he has his hands full when she tries to become one of Mastermind's henchmen. Phoebe tries to help BC ask Chloe to the school dance.

programme.title: E108 - Howling Hope / Mar-Smoothie-Lami
programme.desc: Hope makes lots of noise whilst skateboarding, and her howls are heard around the city causing lots of drama. // The Twins manage the Smoothie Bar and the Marsups end up creating the best smoothie ever.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Teamwork & Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a big day of teamwork & fixes at Gecko's Garage! When the Mechanicals accidentally injure Gecko's foot, they must learn the value of teamwork to finish repairing Bobby the Bus by themselves. Then, when Green Mechanical gets stressed, Gecko teaches her mindfulness tips to calm down. The teamwork continues as Gecko helps his rival, Mr. Weasel, fix an engine with a clean electric one, & the whole crew works together to repair Trevor the Tractor's giant gears!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Music
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - Let's Sing with All the Animals
programme.desc: It's time to sing, play & learn with all of JJ's animal pals! The fun begins as JJ hosts a big talent show in the clubhouse where all his friends get to showcase their unique skills, from magic to circus tricks! Then, everyone joins in for a fun game of 'Follow the Leader,' where JJ learns that a little encouragement goes a long way. Plus, sing along as the friends learn all the different sounds the animals make & help Humpty Dumpty when he keeps falling off a wall!

programme.title: E9 - My Hero, A Story, A Teddy & Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods are learning about heroes, sharing, honesty & eating greens! When Lulu loses her favorite bunny, Bubbles comes to the rescue & becomes her personal superhero! Then, Jeff is excited to read a new book but refuses to include his friends, so he must learn the joy of sharing a story. The lessons continue as Pogo accidentally ruins Newt's teddy-shaped hedge & learns to tell the truth, & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy Oddsprouts!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E6 - The Ultimate Football Warm-Up Dance
programme.desc: Warm up for the ultimate football match with a high-energy dance party! Groove to 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes,' play the Freeze Dance game, and learn that determination can help you win any race. Get ready to move and have fun!

programme.title: E1 - Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster is learning that teamwork makes the dream work! During a big soccer match, Buster is very competitive, but he learns the value of being a team player to help his team win the game. Then, when he & his friend Scout get lost in a big hedge maze, they find that they have to work together to find their way out. From cleaning up toys to helping a friend who is stuck in the mud, teamwork always saves the day!

programme.title: E1 - Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: It's time to learn all about colors, shapes & numbers with Twinkle! First, learn how to count with Twinkle as she finds five balloons in the colors red, blue, green, yellow & purple! Then, join Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to make sandcastles, learning different shapes like squares, triangles & circles. The learning continues as Twinkle & her friends build & count a beautiful tower of rainbow stones & discover the variety of shapes that clouds can take in the sky!

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: E3 - Cody’s Football Season Training Camp
programme.desc: Get ready for game day with Cody's training camp! Imagine racing on extreme motor trikes, join friends on the playground, and go on a fun family hike. Learn about healthy foods at the grocery store to get strong for the big football season!

programme.title: E3 - Songs About Feeling Good & Staying Safe!
programme.desc: Join Kii & Yii for songs about feeling good & staying safe! First, learn the best way to get a healthy smile in a fun & educational song about how to brush your teeth properly. Then, learn how to be safe when you're riding a bike at the playground. The lessons continue as Kii & Yii sing about being kind to each other, especially when a friend is sick. From learning colors to singing a soothing lullaby, these songs will make you feel good!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E1 - The Carrot Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E104 - Join In
programme.desc: The Teletubbies have their favourite things and The Noo-Noo wants to join in. When the Tubby Phone rings, the Teletubbies and The Noo-Noo do the Tubby Phone Dance together.

programme.title: E34 - Space
programme.desc: Mackenzie, Jack and Rusty are playing as astronauts on a mission to Mars, but during their journey, Mackenzie keeps going missing and no one knows why, not even Mackenzie.

programme.title: E11 - Pigs Might Fly
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo are great at picking apples with Mojo's crane top. But Preston's drone might be even better... until it accidentally scoops up Felix. Mojo and Bo are on the chase!

programme.title: E23 - Kite Plight
programme.desc: Evil Pea uses her balloon to cut down everyone's kites so she can rule the supermarket skies. Supertato and Carrot must use chopsticks to stop her.

programme.title: E25 - Aargh! Jelly!
programme.desc: Broccoli shows Supertato her latest art exhibition of jelly sculptures, but jelly is Supertato's secret fear. When Evil Pea finds out, she comes up with an evil idea to beat him.

programme.title: E10 - The Honey Badge
programme.desc: Duggee's made some delicious pancakes, but the clubhouse is out of honey. Time for the bees to get busy!

programme.title: E11 - The Pottery Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is having a lovely cup of tea in his favourite cup when Roly surprises him with a very loud peek-a-boo! It is so loud that Duggee jumps and drops his cup which shatters into pieces.

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E32 - Bumpy And The Wise Old Wolfhound
programme.desc: Bingo is sick in hospital, so Bluey and Dad sent her a homemade video to lift her spirits. It tells the tale of Barnicus' quest to heal her spotty dog named Bumpy.

programme.title: E34 - The Dump
programme.desc: On a trip to the Dump, Dad claims he's the best at everything. But Bluey discovers that Dad's throwing out her old drawing and questions if he really is the best Dad in the world.

programme.title: E35 - Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey's backyard zoo is home to wonderful animals, especially the big blue Daddy gorilla. But when he grabs visitor Bingo and escapes, Zookeeper Bluey must recapture the wild beast.

programme.title: E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled S1E7 -Victoria: The Southern Melting Pot
programme.desc: Sara goes to Melbourne to explore the food culture and find the best local ingredients. First stop, the Queen Victoria Market.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled S1E8 -Victoria: Culinary Roadtrip
programme.desc: Sara heads to Victoria where she visits the farms and wineries, which she finds after travelling inland from the Great Ocean Road. She is planning to visit the restaurant Brae, which is run by an unknown chef.

programme.title: Don't Drive Here S1E5 -Ulaanbaatar
programme.desc: Half of Mongolia lives in this city. And they drive their cars like they ride their horses: fast and furious.

programme.title: E8 - Highlight 8
programme.desc: A broken-down coach on a slip road of the motorway presents a major problem for Crouch recovery op Jon and Highways England. Recovery Op Marta and Tez work together to solve a serious weight issue on her trailer load. Lantern Recovery Op Scott attends a road collision to find a trailer too damaged to tow – with the sun going down, will he get off the highway before darkness falls?

programme.title: E3 - Kamilaroi Highway (Part 2)
programme.desc: Part Two of our Kamilaroi Highway road-trip starts in Lightning Ridge and wraps up in Bourke, and we’re blessed with more sensational countryside, and the awesome stories that make this area of Australia so popular. This is a part of Australia everyone needs to discover.

Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Actuelles
programme.desc: Le journal de celles qui font l'actualité internationale et de ceux qui font bouger le monde, encore largement dominé par les hommes. Avec des reportages, des invités et une page internet.

programme.title: À l'affiche
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: Billet retour
programme.desc: Les reporters de France 24 reviennent dans des villes oubliées qui ont fait la Une de l'actualité. Comment vit-on dans les villes traumatisées par une guerre, une catastrophe naturelle ou un désastre industriel ?

programme.title: Les observateurs
programme.desc: Une émission réalisée à partir de contenus amateurs : photos ou vidéos, tout vient des observateurs du monde entier. Les contenus sont vérifiés par la rédaction de la chaîne.

programme.title: Culture prime
programme.desc: Des vidéos culturelles réunies sous un même label et une identité visuelle cohérente, portées par une ligne éditoriale commune : raconter l'actualité à travers le prisme de la culture.

programme.title: C'est en France
programme.desc: Un regard approfondi sur l'actualité en France : société, politique et culture. À travers des reportages et des interviews, nous explorons les enjeux du quotidien pour mieux comprendre la réalité vécue par les Français aujourd'hui.

programme.title: L'édition nuit : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: L'actualité ne s'arrête jamais. Un journal complet consacré à l'information française et internationale, pour rester informé à tout moment, où que l'on soit dans le monde.

programme.title: La semaine de l'éco
programme.desc: Stéphanie Antoine, accompagnée de ses invités, analyse et décrypte les principaux faits de l'actualité économique internationale de la semaine. Ensemble, ils apportent un éclairage sur les tendances, les enjeux et les dynamiques qui influencent l'économie mondiale.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Wildlife Special Edition 'The Songs Of 300 Humpback Whales In South Africa'
programme.desc: WILDLIFE explores nature and conveys the reality of our planet through breathtaking footage of the natural world and vibrant wildlife, captured with the latest filming technology. This episode follows more than 300 humpback whales gathering off the coast of South Africa, seeking to uncover why they are drawn to these waters instead of leaving their breeding grounds for Antarctica as they normally do.

programme.title: Sloth Moths and Their Very Slow Host
programme.desc: For sloths, every day is a bad-hair day. Their matted locks are crawling with life - from parasites, to algae to a colony of sloth moths. Sloths provide a breeding ground for the moths too!

programme.title: What's Living in This Cave?
programme.desc: Bat colonies in caves bring a whole world of creatures with them. Cockroaches and centipedes love their guano. Snakes and frogs are happy to have bats for dinner.

programme.title: The Impossible Folding Paper
programme.desc: Why can a regular sheet of paper not be folded more than six times? Mathemagician Eric learns that by folding a sheet of paper in half, over and over again, the thickness of the paper doesn't just double: it increases exponentially.

programme.title: Trip to Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Milo battles with mosquitoes using an insecticide spray but realises he can't win. Our heroes decide to pay a visit to their penfriend in Papua New Guinea and learn how to co-exist alongside mosquitoes.

programme.title: What a Stinker!
programme.desc: The smell of Dr Xand's pongy feet takes over the lab, so the doctors investigate. Dr Dan and Dr Raph work their quads with Gladiator Dynamite. And find out where your ginglymus is.

programme.title: The President (F.W. de Klerk) and The Pioneer (Valerie Amos)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, former President of South Africa and Nobel Peace Prize winner President F.W. de Klerk and first Black woman member of the British Government and pioneering British diplomat Valerie Amos share their life lessons.

programme.title: A Chicken Killer
programme.desc: Chip, the dog, is struggling to walk - can a new hip ease his pain? The Junior Vets give some flamingos a foot rub and check on a baby emu. Also, Johnny and Inel learn about the birds and the bees and investigate whether Jasper, the cat, really is a chicken killer.

programme.title: What's Living in This Cave?
programme.desc: Bat colonies in caves bring a whole world of creatures with them. Cockroaches and centipedes love their guano. Snakes and frogs are happy to have bats for dinner.

programme.title: Balloon
programme.desc: Let's get poppin with some creative DIYs!

programme.title: Corals and Reefs
programme.desc: A coral reef exploration goes downhill when Mr. Battery is abducted by an electric stingray.

programme.title: The Metric System
programme.desc: The Metric System is a universal way to measure length, weight, volume, time, electricity and temperature. It is used widely today in countries all over the world, and is also the standard in the science community and is crucial to global industry. But how does it work?

programme.title: Electric Current and Power
programme.desc: How do batteries work? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of electricity. Have hands-on fun by making a battery using lemons, and get to know Nikola Tesla, physicist, engineer and inventor, who conceived the modern alternating current supply system.

programme.title: Great Craters!
programme.desc: Jupiter thinks the moon looks a lot like Momma's Swiss cheese but Luna is quite positive the moon is not made out of cheese.

programme.title: The Metric System
programme.desc: The Metric System is a universal way to measure length, weight, volume, time, electricity and temperature. It is used widely today in countries all over the world, and is also the standard in the science community and is crucial to global industry. But how does it work?

programme.title: Chocolate Cake
programme.desc: Telmo and Tula decide to prepare a delicious chocolate cake. Telmo wants to show everyone how he manages to mix all the ingredients, so Grown-up keeps an eye on the kids while they perform the dangerous tasks.

programme.title: Square Portrait
programme.desc: Copy a portrait by reproducing fragments of it in squares.

programme.title: New Orleans
programme.desc: New Orleans charm: Culinary delights at New Orleans School of Cooking, swamp tour with alligators, Habitat for Humanity in the 9th ward, and jazz appreciation at a local music club. A week of rich experiences with Nicole and local teens in the vibrant city!

programme.title: Corals and Reefs
programme.desc: A coral reef exploration goes downhill when Mr. Battery is abducted by an electric stingray.

programme.title: Tartaruga
programme.desc: The Nektons explore a floating island and find the pieces of the ancient Lemurian navigation device. But why is this island moving?

programme.title: Slam Dunk Dynamite!
programme.desc: Gladiator Dynamite puts Dr Dan and Dr Raph's core muscles to the test, Dr Chris shoots hoops with a basketball dunking champ, while Dr Ronx is lifted into the air by finger power!

programme.title: Toddy to the Rescue
programme.desc: Pixel's biggest fan, 6-year-old Toddy Munson, insists on helping Team Alien any way he can - which becomes a more destructive distraction for their human enemies than the Kemii could ever have dreamed of.

programme.title: Computer Programme
programme.desc: When we need a robot to do several things many times, we save these instructions in the form of a computer program. Find out more about how these programs are used and written.

programme.title: Presidential Cycling Tour Of Turkiye

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: E475
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.

programme.title: E482
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. This program shows the great architectures and how they inspire us in various ways.

programme.desc: King Thistle is confused when his magic bird-spotting book fails to identify a new creature that has made a nest in the castle. // Nanny Plum conjures up a hamster called Pippin for the twins, but the naughty new pet causes chaos in the castle.

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E742 - When I Grow Up
programme.desc: It's time for playgroup and today Peppa and friends are deciding what they might like to be when they grow up.

programme.title: E745 - Doctors
programme.desc: When Tiddles the Tortoise gets stuck in a tree, Pedro Pony has trouble trying to rescue him!

programme.title: E121 - Woodpecker / Daisy & Poppy's Pet
programme.desc: King Thistle is confused when his magic bird-spotting book fails to identify a new creature that has made a nest in the castle. // Nanny Plum conjures up a hamster called Pippin for the twins, but the naughty new pet causes chaos in the castle.

programme.title: E209 - One Last For The Road / The Little Critters
programme.desc: The Barbababies love bedtime stories, except if they are always the same... // Barbabelle had a restless night because of all the insects!

programme.title: E502 - The Trophy Chase
programme.desc: The Championship Race is about to start, and all the fastest trucks in town are ready to roll! But when Crusher steals the trophy before the race even begins, it's up to Blaze and his friends to get it back in time.

programme.title: E205 - The Crew Builds A Hair Salon / The Crew Builds A Colorful Crystal Show
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a hair salon just in time for Grandpa Gravel's special photo-until they run into a squirrely shampoo setback! / Motor and Lily make a shiny discovery worth celebrating... with the coolest light show the pups have ever seen!

programme.title: E105 - Nebulator
programme.desc: Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure.

programme.title: E209 - One Last For The Road / The Little Critters
programme.desc: The Barbababies love bedtime stories, except if they are always the same... // Barbabelle had a restless night because of all the insects!

programme.title: E105 - The Crew Builds A Car Wash / The Crew Plans Grandpa Day
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs her muddy motorcycle cleaned fast! Wheeler and the pups jump into action to build a solution before the big race. // It's Grandpa Gravel's special day! But when the pups are needed, they have to change their Grandpa Day plans.

programme.title: E106 - The Crew Builds A Skate Park / The Crew Builds A Tunnel
programme.desc: The Crew has a mishap while building a skatepark. // The Crew helps a pop star get her tour bus to town.

programme.title: E721 - Pups Save A Trash-Dinger / Pups Save The Royal Armor
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's trash-compacting truck is messing up the beach. It's up to Rocky's new Re-Use It Truck to help save a rescue! // Gift for the Princess been scattered all over town. It's up to Rocky's Re-Use It Truck to put her gifts back together!

programme.title: E202 - The Crew Builds A Train Station / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Sign
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the first train station in Builder Cove just in time to welcome Farmer Zoe's new cow Mooreen. // Popstar Sierra Sparkle is moving to Builder Cove! But when the pups plan a surprise greeting, Speed Meister makes a plan of his own.

programme.title: E742 - When I Grow Up
programme.desc: It's time for playgroup and today Peppa and friends are deciding what they might like to be when they grow up.

E1
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.desc: A daughter's fight for dignity and an intelligence officer's war for truth, Jagadhatri's dual life embodies strength, sacrifice and the relentless pursuit of justice.

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile E502
programme.desc: Dhruv tells the media that Unnati will join him as his business partner. Unnati then provides proof against Vikrant and wins the case. Unnati credits Reet for her victory, leaving Sharda enraged.

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Chulbul Pandey, a wayward policeman, kills the brother of a crooked politician. Release Year: 2012 Director: Arbaaz Khan Awards: 2013 Winner Popular Award for Best Actor - Salman Khan

programme.title: E18 - Berry, The Heart's Choice
programme.desc: Just two hours from Paris, the Berry is a discreet and little-known land of rural charm and tranquil landscapes. Vast plains, dense forests and peaceful rivers form a simple, authentic picture, far from the hustle and bustle of the big cities, perfect for a revitalising getaway...

programme.title: E6 - Curieux Begin In Tuscany
programme.desc: Stopover in Italy! From Chianti to Subbiano, from large vineyards to small farms, Christian visits Tuscany and discovers its land, artisans, and culinary treasures.

programme.title: E8 - Clemence D'ennery/Juliette Clovis/Rabanne/Marion Mezenge
programme.desc: Clemence d'Ennery unveils her collection of Asian works in a Paris hotel. Using porcelain petals, Juliette Clovis opens up a luminous, dreamlike world. At Rabanne, we push the boundaries of women's dressing with bold materials. Immerse yourself in the studio of artist Marion Mezenge.

programme.title: E7 - The Roots Of Backcountry Skiing
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas visit Mount Assiniboine, the birthplace of backcountry skiing in North America. To better understand the sport's origins, they meet Claude Duchesne, who takes them on a journey through time.

programme.title: E16 - Louis Gabriel Nouchi
programme.desc: Viviane welcomes her first menswear designer! Louis Gabriel Nouchi presents his 2023-2024 autumn-winter collection, inspired by the novel ''American Psycho'' by Bret Easton Ellis.

programme.title: E2 - The Marriage Of Figaro
programme.desc: A sequel to ''The Barber of Seville'', the opera buffa ''The Marriage of Figaro'', by Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart, was created on 1 May 1786 in Vienna. Extracts of the production staged by Ivan Alexandre in 2022 at the Bordeaux Grand Theatre, conducted by Marc Minkovski.

programme.title: E16 - Semolina Cakes
programme.desc: This week, Leila Albert welcomes Rosine Binder from Alsace who loves her region, into her kitchen. She concocts a traditional recipe that she inherited from her mother: griesknepfle, or semolina cakes, and a savoury gratin with tomato sauce.

programme.title: E37 - Azay-Le-Ferron - La Guerche
programme.desc: The Chateau of Azay-le-Ferron is a true architectural chameleon, with influences ranging from the 15th to the 20th centuries. Built to defend and impress, the Chateau of La Guerche was partially cut down during the French Revolution.

You're OK, I'm OK
programme.desc: Twenty-five year old Liang Shao Chiang leads a boring life working as an auditor in a big finance corporation. He only has eyes for the receptionist Chow Yun-Lan. Chow is young and pretty, and is the natural target for the bunch of horny men around her. But she is pert and secretive, and no one is able to get even a date from her. Liang has fallen deeper and deeper for Chow. Alas this love is not reciprocative. But suddenly there is a breakthrough in his career, for four managers of the company is recommending a promotion for him! Of course, there is a price behind this - Liang has to let them use his bachelor apartment for conducting love affairs! Soon this scandal travels to the ears of the general manager Mr. Lui...

programme.title: Gorgeous
programme.desc: C.N. faces his greatest challenge when he meets young country girl Bu and falls in love! But when Howie sets a trap for him, C.N. must prepare to fight for his lady and his life!

programme.title: You're OK, I'm OK
programme.desc: Twenty-five year old Liang Shao Chiang leads a boring life working as an auditor in a big finance corporation. He only has eyes for the receptionist Chow Yun-Lan. Chow is young and pretty, and is the natural target for the bunch of horny men around her. But she is pert and secretive, and no one is able to get even a date from her. Liang has fallen deeper and deeper for Chow. Alas this love is not reciprocative. But suddenly there is a breakthrough in his career, for four managers of the company is recommending a promotion for him! Of course, there is a price behind this - Liang has to let them use his bachelor apartment for conducting love affairs! Soon this scandal travels to the ears of the general manager Mr. Lui...

programme.title: The Private Eyes
programme.desc: Joseph Wong (Michael Hui), the kingpin of the Manix Private Detective Agency, a firm believer in tact and thrift. By tact, he means you can cheat all the people all the time and corners are there to be cut. By thrift, he means an underpaid staff is happy and grateful staff. By chance, he employs Lee Kwok Kit (Samuel Hui). Together, they have solved lots of wired cases. One day, while the two are investigating a blackmail case, the movie goes off and the lights come on. Scores of gun-toting hoods hold the more than 1,000 goers as hostages. On the stage Uncle Gaw (Shek Kin) threatens that it is a hold-up!

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.desc: It follows an amateur boxer who dreams of fulfilling his family legacy to be a champion but his biggest fight would not be in the ring but in his home.

programme.title: E45
programme.desc: 突破傳統的交友方式，24位單身女生以亮燈和滅燈方式來決定男嘉賓去留，通過「愛之初體驗」、「愛之再判斷」、「愛之終決選」、「男生權利」等決定男女嘉賓的速配成功。

programme.title: E4 - 新官上任 常華森代旭變rapper？
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E5 - 伊芙又走上了爸媽的套路
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: 2017-2018 Jiangsu Count Down Concert (Repackaged)

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.desc: Compass was given rare access to Labassa, the historic Renaissance mansion in Melbourne to film many of the remaining tenants. We focus on the post war years of Jewish refugees and 1970's bohemians, artists and performers.

programme.title: E44
programme.desc: When you need to know what's happening turn to ABC News for coverage you can trust. Meredith Sheehan brings you the day's news by reporters in more locations across Australia, connecting communities and telling your stories.

programme.title: E44
programme.desc: The final word on the day's top stories, with the latest news and updated information from Australia's most trusted source of independent news. Presented by Meredith Sheehan.

programme.title: E8 - High Hopes - Nepal
programme.desc: When Australian Audette Exel applied her skills to support some of the world's poorest she helped transform lives including Angjuk Lama, a former yak herder who is now giving back by helping others in his Himalayan homeland.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: Does good architecture have the power to heal? Kevin revisits Elinor and Born, who built a clean-aired, hypoallergenic house, motivated by their two boys' extreme allergies.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Amanda and Alan go all out for their last room, designing a lavish Moorish-themed bar and reveal their labour of love with a big farewell party for their friends and family.

programme.title: E2 - The Highlands
programme.desc: Up in Bonnie Scotland, Zuu and AJ head to the luxury 'old money' estates of the rich and high society. They eat the most expensive haggis in the world (coming in at £4000), sample scotch whiskey, ride carriages, go fishing and hunting, before putting their own spin on classic Scottish cuisine.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Amanda and Alan face the daunting task of transforming the main ground floor room, which resembles a dreary barn, into a Greek-chic living and dining area.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

Baogu At the Movie E283 -Cold War 1994
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: The Sleep Curse
programme.desc: During Japan's wartime occupation of Hong Kong in 1941-1945, a young translator's collaboration with the enemy results in his life being cursed by a murdered 'comfort woman' forced to become a sex slave. Forty-five years later, the man's sins come back to haunt his son, a professor specializing in sleeping disorders, when the lady's ghost returns for vengeance.

programme.title: Full River Red
programme.desc: 12th century China, during the Song Dynasty, set against a brewing rebellion by the Jin people against the Imperial Court.Two hours before a crucial diplomatic meeting between the Song Prime Minister Qin Hui and a high level Jin delegation, the Jin Ambassador is murdered. An important letter destined for the Emperor is stolen from him. As the search for the letter unfolds, alliances are formed, secrets are revealed, and no one can stop the truth that is destined to leave its mark in history.

programme.title: Thoroughly Modern Millie
programme.desc: Elmer Bernstein's score highlights this story of two women who arrive in 1920s New York searching for work and romance.
